March 3, 1985

Pick up flour, lamp oil, and twine.
Leave the blue ledger with Nora.
If the rain starts before noon, move the seed trays inside.

Remember: the key for the north shed is under the cracked flower pot.

===PAGE===

April 12

Mara,
I checked the attic boxes after supper. The letters from Aunt Elise are tied with green ribbon, not red.
Please copy the names before Sunday and bring the small brass compass back to the desk drawer.

- N.
